caption: A news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया" features a panel discussion in New Delhi in December 2023. Three men are seated at a long white table; one wears a white garment with a patterned shawl, and another wears a dark sleeveless jacket over a white shirt. On the left, a man in a red garment and glasses is visible in a small inset window. The screen displays various Hindi text overlays, including "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला होगा'?" at the top, and names like "विजय चौधरी," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "नीतीश कुमार" accompanying small portrait photos. As the sequence progresses, the red lower-third banner changes, introducing "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" on the left and "जे. पी. नड्डा: 1" on the right. The clock in the bottom right consistently reads "10:06 PM." The men at the table remain largely stationary, with one man occasionally gesturing with his hand while speaking.
